[Ax01]
  • Get Started
  • Docs
  • Axicons
GitHub

Sidebar

Collapsible side navigation panel perfect for app layouts and responsive design.

Overview

The Sidebar component provides a collapsible navigation panel for app layouts. It uses semantic `

` elements with `data-open` state toggling and smooth transitions.

Basic Usage

Simple Sidebar

  • Home
  • About
  • Services
  • Contact

Main content area

<aside class="sidebar" data-open="true">
    <nav>
        <ul>
            <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
            <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
            <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
        </ul>
    </nav>
</aside>

With Toggle Button

  • Home
  • About
  • Services
Content

Click menu button to toggle sidebar

<button class="sidebar-toggle" aria-label="Toggle Sidebar">☰</button>
<aside class="sidebar" data-open="false">
    <nav>
        <ul>
            <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
            <!-- Navigation items... -->
        </ul>
    </nav>
</aside>

Structure

Element Purpose Required
<aside class="sidebar"> Container for sidebar content Yes
data-open State attribute (true/false) for visibility Yes
<nav> Semantic navigation container Recommended
<ul> / <li> Navigation list items Recommended

Styling & Customization

/* Sidebar container */
aside.sidebar {
    background: var(--a-color-surface);
    border-right: 1px solid var(--a-color-outline);
    width: 250px;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, width 0.3s ease;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

/* Hidden state */
aside.sidebar[data-open="false"] {
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    width: 0;
}

/* Navigation links */
aside.sidebar a {
    display: block;
    padding: var(--a-space-m);
    color: var(--a-color-on-surface);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
}

aside.sidebar a:hover {
    background-color: var(--a-color-surface-variant);
}

Accessibility

  • Semantic HTML: Uses `<aside>` and `<nav>` elements
  • ARIA Attributes: Toggle buttons should have aria-label
  • Keyboard Navigation: All links and buttons are keyboard accessible
  • State Management: `data-open` attribute clearly indicates state
  • Focus Management: Focus should move when sidebar opens/closes

Integration Examples

App Layout with Sidebar

<body>
    <header class="main">
        <button class="sidebar-toggle">☰</button>
    </header>
    
    <div class="app-layout">
        <aside class="sidebar" data-open="true">
            <nav>
                <ul>
                    <li><a href="/dashboard">Dashboard</a></li>
                    <li><a href="/users">Users</a></li>
                    <li><a href="/settings">Settings</a></li>
                </ul>
            </nav>
        </aside>
        
        <main>
            <!-- Page content -->
        </main>
    </div>
</body>

Responsive Sidebar (Mobile-First)

/* Mobile: Sidebar hidden by default */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    aside.sidebar {
        position: fixed;
        left: 0;
        top: 60px;
        height: calc(100vh - 60px);
        z-index: 999;
        box-shadow: var(--a-shadow-large);
    }
}

/* Desktop: Sidebar visible */
@media (min-width: 769px) {
    aside.sidebar {
        position: relative;
        transform: translateX(0) !important;
        width: 250px;
    }
}
